log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Kor — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Kor — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:19+3=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 4casting_mod force damage. Kor — Winged Striker HP: NaN/67
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Kor — Winged Striker.
→ Kor — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Kor — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Kor — Winged Striker --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):4+1=5 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
